title: Saccus champeden
taxonomy: Saccus champeden is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Euphorbiaceae. This classification makes it a member of the Euphorbiaceae family, which consists of spurge and poinsettia plants. Further classification places Saccus champeden in the order Malpighiales. The family Euphorbiaceae is part of the larger clade Sapindales. This comprehensive classification gives insight into the evolutionary relationships of Saccus champeden.
